name: Mexican Beef #1
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 lb to 2 lbs boneless round steak
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread meat with mixture of garlic, pepper, salt, chili powder, and mustard.
2. Cut into 1/2-inch wide strips.
3. Place in slow-cooking pot.
4. Cover with onion, bouillon cube, and tomatoes.
5. Cook on low for 6 to 8 hours.
6. Turn control to high.
7. Add beans and cook, covered, for 30 minutes.
8. Serve over a bed of rice.
